name: 26"x26" Quilt Euro Square Throw Pillow Green - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Lend a touch of warmth and style to your living space decor with the Quilt Euro Square Throw Pillow from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Constructed from 100% cotton voile fabric with recycled polyester filling to provide cushioned comfort, this square throw pillow features a gorgeous quilted stitch pattern with flange edges in a green hue that complements any style aesthetic. Place it with coordinating lumbar pillows to create an elegant bedroom decor.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
